title: Annan Enna Thambi Enna Lyrics Dharma Durai
stanzas:
Annan Enna Thambi Enna Song Lyrics Dharma Durai(1991)
#Ilaiyaraja #KJYesudas

Annan enna thambi enna
sondham enna bandham enna
solladi enaku padhilai

nandri kondra ullangalai
kandu kandu vendha pinbu
ennadi enakku velai

nambi nambi vembi vembi
ondrumillai endra pinbu
uravu kidakku podi
indha unmaiyai
kandavan gyaani  (2)

Annan enna thambi enna
sondham enna bandham enna

aasayil naan vaitha
paasathil nesathil
vandhadhingu vedhanaiyum
sodhanaiyum thaan.

nenjam vendhadhadi
sogathinil thaan

paambuku paal vaithu
naan seitha paavathil
vandhhathingu
konjamalla nanjamalladi

endhan nenjamingu
nenjam alladi

Car-ukkum paerukkum
thaerukkum aasai enna
nerukku nerindri
eithidum mosam enna

oorukku niyayangal
sollidum vesam enna
unmaiyai kondra pin
nenjuku needhi enna

pogum paadhai thavaraanal
podum kanakkum thavaraagum
oh oh oh.

Annan enna thambi enna
sondham enna bandham enna

Annan enna thambi enna
sondham enna bandham enna
solladi enaku padhilai

nandri kondra ullangalai
kandu kandu vendha pinbu
ennadi enakku velai

nambi nambi vembi vembi
ondrumillai endra pinbu
uravu kidakku podi
indha unmaiyai
kandavan gyaani  (2)

Annan enna thambi enna
sondham enna bandham enna

thandhaiyil solindru
mandhiram thaan endru
kandaddhadi
pillai enthan
unmai ullame

enthan ullam engum
anbu vellame.

sondhathil bandhathil
mosathil sogathil
vandhu nindru
unmaithani indru
unarnthen

idhai kandu kandu
indru thelindhen

pattadhu pattadhu
en manam pattadhadi
suttadhu suttadhu
sattigal suttadhadi

vittadhu vittadhu
kaigalum vittadhadi
kottudhu kottudhu
niyanamum kottudhadi

vaanam paarthu
parakkaadhe.
boomiyil pirandhaai
marakkaathe.
oh oh oh..

Annan enna thambi enna
sondham enna bandham enna
solladi enaku padhilai

nandri kondra ullangalai
kandu kandu vendha pinbu
ennadi enakku velai

nambi nambi vembi vembi
ondrumillai endra pinbu
uravu kidakku podi
indha unmaiyai
kandavan gyaani  (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song explores the themes of familial relationships and the bonds between siblings.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Dharma Durai, the song reflects the emotional struggles and connections between the characters.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary K.J. Yesudas.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music is composed by the acclaimed Ilaiyaraaja.

When was this song released?

The song was released in 1991.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Annan Enna Thambi Enna, the poignant lyrics delve into the complexities of sibling relationships, evoking a sense of nostalgia and melancholy. The song beautifully conveys the emotions tied to familial bonds, making it a heartfelt piece in the film Dharma Durai. With K.J. Yesudas's soulful rendition and Ilaiyaraaja's masterful composition, listeners are transported to a place of reflection and warmth. This classic melody remains a cherished favorite among fans of Tamil music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Annan Enna Thambi Enna is a timeless melody that beautifully captures the essence of sibling bonds and emotions. With the enchanting voice of K.J. Yesudas and the masterful composition by Ilaiyaraaja, this song resonates with anyone who cherishes family ties. Dive into the heartfelt lyrics and let the nostalgia wash over you as you explore the depths of Dharma Durai.
stanzaMeanings: What is brother, what is younger brother, what is relationship, what is bond, please tell me, I have no idea.
After seeing the grateful hearts, what work do I have left?
Trusting and doubting, there is nothing; after that, the bond becomes weak. The one who sees this truth is wise.
What is brother, what is younger brother, what is relationship, what is bond?
In my desire, I placed love, and in affection, pain and testing came.
My heart desires only in sorrow.
I placed milk for the snake, and it came in the form of a little one, not just a little, but a lot.
My heart is not just a heart.
For the car, the name, and the vehicle, what is the desire? Without connection, what is the bad?
What is the disguise that tells justice to the town? After knowing the truth, what is justice for the heart?
If the path goes wrong, the calculation will also go wrong, oh oh oh.
What is brother, what is younger brother, what is relationship, what is bond?
What is brother, what is younger brother, what is relationship, what is bond, please tell me, I have no idea.
After seeing the grateful hearts, what work do I have left?
Trusting and doubting, there is nothing; after that, the bond becomes weak. The one who sees this truth is wise.
What is brother, what is younger brother, what is relationship, what is bond?
In father’s words, there is a mantra; I found that, child, what is the truth in my heart?
My heart is love everywhere.
In the bond, in the relationship, in the bad, in the sorrow, I stood today, realizing the truth.
Seeing this, I understood today.
What has happened has happened; my heart has not accepted it; it has turned, turned, and the rules have turned.
What has been let go has been let go; the hands have also let go; what has been given has been given; the rules have also been given.
Do not forget to look at the sky. You were born on earth. Oh oh oh..
What is brother, what is younger brother, what is relationship, what is bond, please tell me, I have no idea.
After seeing the grateful hearts, what work do I have left?
Trusting and doubting, there is nothing; after that, the bond becomes weak. The one who sees this truth is wise.
